subject: fix(gestures): smooth swipe-to-reply animation and add bidirectional swipe on web
body:
Replace React state-driven swipe animation with direct DOM manipulation via refs
for consistent 60fps performance. Previously, each touch move triggered setState →
re-render → new CSS transform, causing intermittent jerkiness. Now transforms are
applied directly to DOM elements during the swipe, with CSS transitions only used
for the spring-back animation on release.

Also adds bidirectional swipe support on web (previously right-only) to match
native behavior. Reply icon dynamically positions based on swipe direction.

Tags: gestures, performance, ui, reply
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: chat-ux
Semver: patch
